org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures

Class FSMStartPointFigure

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view.AbstractViewComponent
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.AbstractFigure
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.AbstractModelObjectFigure<N>
            • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node.NodeFigure<N,A>
              • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node.EllipseNodeFigure<N,A>
                • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node.CircleNodeFigure<FSMStartPoint,FSMAnchor>
                  • org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures.FSMStartPointFigure
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ViewComponent>, Selectable, PropertyOwner, BlockFigure, Figure, ModelObjectFigure<FSMStartPoint>, ModelObjectView<FSMStartPoint>, ViewComponent, ViewComponentConstants, PropertyNames, View

    public class FSMStartPointFigure
extends CircleNodeFigure<FSMStartPoint,FSMAnchor>
    Figure for the start points of the FSM.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:12
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
